text: Find the true north/Pewter-side exit of Viridian Forest from a checkpoint family not already proven to rejoin top-center, signlane, south gatehouse, lower sign-pocket, or the `(26,24..26)` vertical corridor
Start the next action turn by rewinding away from the live stale `(17,11)` state; do not explore from `turn499_forest_17_11_newlane_start`
Use viridian-forest-loop-triage / checkpoint-family audit before spending more probes in Viridian Forest
Keep a fresh checkpoint before any genuinely new forest probe or before trainer interaction
Use the installed viridian-forest-wild-run-recipe whenever a common wild battle starts during forest mapping
Demote and avoid the confirmed south-gate backtrack family (inside gatehouse and outside Route 2 south frontage)
Do not continue from Viridian Forest South Gate; it is confirmed to be a backtrack to south Route 2
